title: triticum triunciale var. brachyatherum
intro: Triticum triunciale var. brachyatherum, a lesser-known variant of the wild wheat plant, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to help with digestion, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, Triticum triunciale var. brachyatherum is prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in tinctures or dried as a powder for herbal remedies.
